scripts.start: npm run build -w @radon-lite/registry && concurrently -n ui,tools "npm run dev -w @radon-lite/ui" "npm run dev -w @radon-lite/tools"
scripts.start:tools: npm run build -w @radon-lite/registry && npm run dev -w @radon-lite/tools
scripts.pack:mcp: npm run build -w argent && npm pack -w argent --pack-destination .
